targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_requests_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "counter")
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: true)
  |> group(columns: ["route"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.route}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

total = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_requests_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "counter")
  |> derivative(unit: 5m, nonNegative: true)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "total")

errors = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_errors_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "counter")
  |> derivative(unit: 5m, nonNegative: true)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "errors")

union(tables: [total, errors])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if exists r.total and r.total > 0.0 then (if exists r.errors then r.errors else 0.0) / r.total * 100.0 else 0.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "error_rate_pct")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_request_duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "count" and r._field != "sum" and r._field != "+Inf")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true, columns: ["_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "_field"])
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, le: r._field}))
  |> group(columns: ["le"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_request_duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "count" and r._field != "sum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true, columns: ["_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "_field"])
  |> sum()
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, le: float(v: r._field)}))
  |> sort(columns: ["le"])
  |> histogramQuantile(quantile: 0.50, upperBoundColumn: "le")
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "p50")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_request_duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "count" and r._field != "sum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true, columns: ["_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "_field"])
  |> sum()
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, le: float(v: r._field)}))
  |> sort(columns: ["le"])
  |> histogramQuantile(quantile: 0.95, upperBoundColumn: "le")
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "p95")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_request_duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "count" and r._field != "sum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true, columns: ["_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "_field"])
  |> sum()
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, le: float(v: r._field)}))
  |> sort(columns: ["le"])
  |> histogramQuantile(quantile: 0.99, upperBoundColumn: "le")
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "p99")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Latency p50 / p95 / p99 (alert threshold p99 = 200ms)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.cpu == "cpu-total")
  |> last()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "cpu_usage_active")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.cpu == "cpu-total")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "cpu_usage_active")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")
  |> last()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "mem_used_percent")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "mem_used_percent")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

goroutines = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "goroutines_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gauge")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "goroutines_active")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

queued = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "requests_queued")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gauge")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "requests_queued")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

union(tables: [goroutines, queued])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

active = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "db_connections_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gauge")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "db_connections_active")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

waiting = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "db_connections_waiting")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gauge")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: duration(v: "${resolution}"), fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "db_connections_waiting")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

union(tables: [active, waiting])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: DB Connection Pool — active vs waiting (saturation)

targets.expr: {service="api-service"} | json | status >= 500 | line_format "[{{.timestamp}}] {{.method}} {{.route}} status={{.status}} duration_ms={{.duration_ms}} trace_id={{.trace_id}}"

panels.title: Request Log Stream — 5xx requests with route + duration_ms
